title: Evaluation of Carbon Capture, Use and Storage (CCUS) Innovation Programmes
body: "DESNZ has funded two independent evaluations of these innovation programmes. This report covers the Carbon Capture and Utilisation Demonstration (CCUD) innovation programme, the CCUS Innovation programme and the Accelerating CCS Technologies (ACT) programme, rounds 1 and 2.  The second covers the Industrial Fuel Switching and the Hydrogen Supply programmes.  The evaluations assessed both the delivery processes and the achievements and impacts of the innovation programmes.  "
